payload.label: outlet
payload.long_description: White plastic rectangular wall-mounted outlet faceplate, mostly visible but slightly blurred and low-resolution with faint colored markings and possible duplex/GFCI features; appears slightly edge-cropped and photographed from about 1.0 m away.
